nodes.label: AI as coding accelerator for non-expert domains
nodes.label_negative: Manual struggle with documentation and parameters
nodes.grounding_span: AI has helped me tremendously in this aspect - I no longer need to know exactly how to implement the ideas in my head

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement threatening job security
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI in a collaborative manner, which means it's still me doing the work, while AI just assists me

nodes.label: Personal writing as authentic expression
nodes.grounding_span: I feel like writing is a place where someone can really 'express' themselves

nodes.label: AI leading to skill atrophy through over-reliance
nodes.grounding_span: I honestly don't think I could do that anymore

nodes.label: AI as knowledge gap filler
nodes.label_negative: AI as sufficient despite knowledge gaps
nodes.grounding_span: my limited knowledge of frontend development led to me being unable to collaboratively solve this issue using AI

nodes.label: Personal autonomy and discovery
nodes.grounding_span: I like using my own little quirks (such as the Oxford comma) in my writing

nodes.label: Job security and skill relevance
nodes.grounding_span: It made me feel very replaceable, which in turn pushed me to work harder

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: AI has helped me tremendously in this aspect

nodes.label: Reluctance to use AI for writing
nodes.grounding_span: I try to avoid using AI for writing

nodes.label: Concern about AI replacing skills
nodes.grounding_span: I honestly don't think I could do that anymore

nodes.label: Positive reliance on AI for bridging knowledge gaps
nodes.grounding_span: This was an experience that made me frustrated

nodes.label: Concern about AI replacing jobs
nodes.grounding_span: It made me feel very replaceable

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with limited back-and-forth
nodes.grounding_span: I often have to go back and forth quite a bit, iterating until I'm happy with the outcome

nodes.label: Domain compartmentalisation — reserving writing for personal expression
nodes.grounding_span: I try to avoid using AI for writing. It's an entirely personal reason
